thesisDrivers: Savannah benefits from port-led logistics growth, healthcare employment, tourism, higher education, and steady in-migration.
Abercorn Street remains one of Savannah's most durable north-south commercial corridors.
The property sits near Candler Hospital, Savannah Technical College, Twelve Oaks Shopping Center, Publix, and regional medical demand.
